home.hero_desc: The best gym in Sukabumi, featuring professional personal trainers and a comprehensive fitness program.

program.program_desc: The workout programs at Maxgym Performance are specifically designed to help you achieve your fitness goals and reach peak physical condition effectively and safely.

list.title: Personal Training
list.desc: One-on-one training with professional trainers tailored to your goals and schedule

list.title: Strength Training
list.desc: Build muscle, increase strength, and achieve your ideal physique with structured weight training programs

list.title: Group Class (Zumba)
list.desc: High-energy and fun fitness classes suitable for all ages and fitness levels

list.title: Fitness Training
list.desc: Personalized workouts designed according to your goals, schedule, and fitness level

choose.choose_desc: We are committed to providing the best gym experience for every member with state-of-the-art facilities and professional service.

list.title: Experienced Trainers
list.desc: Professional and certified trainers ready to guide you from the start until your fitness goals are achieved

list.title: Modern Equipment
list.desc: Complete facilities with modern gym equipment to support various types of workouts

list.title: Affordable Price
list.desc: Starting from 150K per month, you can enjoy complete gym facilities at an affordable price

list.title: Supportive Community
list.desc: Join a positive gym community that supports and motivates each other

gallery.desc: A modern workout space designed to help you get the most out of your fitness journey.

WWO.desc: Max Gym Performance offers a variety of fitness programs, such as personal training, strength training, cardio, and Zumba classes, designed to help you achieve your fitness goals effectively and safely.

list.title: Personal Training
list.desc: Personal training sessions with a professional Maxgym Performance trainer, tailored to your physical condition, goals, and schedule.

list.title: Group Class (Zumba)
list.desc: An energetic and fun Zumba class at Maxgym, suitable for all ages and fitness levels.

list.title: Membership
list.desc: Flexible packages available for visit or monthly membership. Get full access to all gym facilities

list.title: Strength Training
list.desc: A strength training program designed to build strength and muscle mass using safe and targeted techniques.

list.title: Cardio Training
list.desc: Cardio workouts using modern equipment to boost stamina, maintain heart health, and burn calories.

list.title: Workout Guidance
list.desc: Workout guides from Maxgym trainers to help you use the equipment properly and create a workout program tailored to your needs.

fasilitas.desc: Maxgym Performance offers modern gym facilities to ensure that every workout session is comfortable and effective.

plan.desc:
MaxGym Performance offers a variety of flexible membership options, suitable for both beginners
and those with experience in the fitness world.

list.title: Regular Package
list.desc: For general members who want flexible training

list.title: Student Package
list.desc: Special price for students.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Have questions about membership, facilities, or how to get started? We've got the answers

list.title: What are the gym's operating hours?
list.desc: Monday – Friday: 14.00 – 22.00 WIB. Saturday – Sunday: 14.00 – 22.00 WIB. We are open every day including public holidays

list.title: Is there a trial or day pass available?
list.desc: Yes! We offer visit passes for Rp 55K (Regular) and Rp 35K (Student) per visit, including mineral water

list.title: What is included in the membership?
list.desc: Every membership includes full access to all gym equipment, locker rooms, and Zumba fitness classes. Personal trainer guidance is also available upon request

list.title: How do I register as a member?
list.desc: You can register directly at our gym or contact us via WhatsApp. Our admin will guide you through the registration process and help you choose the right plan

list.title: Is there a student discount available?
list.desc: Yes! We offer a special Student Package at Rp 150K/month and Rp 35K/visit. Simply show your valid student ID upon registration

info.title: Max Gym

adversement_3.title: Ready to Train? Your First Session Starts Today
adversement_3.desc: See our equipment firsthand, meet our trainers, and experience training at Max Gym

about.title: Max Gym
about.desc: MaxGym & Zumba Fitness Performance is a fitness center in Sukabumi that provides gym facilities and Zumba classes.

testimonial.desc: Real experiences from our loyal Max Gym members

rate.desc: Finally found an aesthetic gym that is very clean and well organized. You must try it! The price is also totally worth it. Best!
The place is very comfortable. I've been working out here since the beginning of the year and I still come regularly 🔥
The location is strategic and close to my house. The facilities are complete, clean, and very comfortable.
I tried working out here once. The place is nice and clean, and the equipment is complete and high quality. Next time I want to become a member here 🫶
The place is comfortable and the facilities are very complete. Most importantly, the restroom and prayer room are also clean 🤍
The place is great, clean, the service is good, and the fitness equipment is new. Best!
